# rom.ecm.helpers { #skrom.rom.ecm.helpers }

`rom.ecm.helpers`

Helper utilities for ECM-based hyperreduction.

This module converts ECM-selected Gauss-point data into dense per-element,
per-Gauss-point arrays suitable for ROM assembly.

## Notes {.doc-section .doc-section-notes}

The bilinear and linear ECM assemblers in this folder assume that the stored
ECM weights act as multiplicative factors on scikit-fem's native quadrature
contributions, i.e. on quantities that already include ``basis.dx``.

If an external ECM implementation returns *absolute* cubature weights for the
reference quadrature rule, pass the reference Gauss weights through
``base_quadrature_weights`` so that the helper divides by them and produces the
multipliers expected by the assemblers.

## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [active_ecm_elements](#skrom.rom.ecm.helpers.active_ecm_elements) | Return element indices whose ECM weight row has at least one active Gauss point. |
| [dense_ecm_weights](#skrom.rom.ecm.helpers.dense_ecm_weights) | Build a dense ECM-weight array of shape ``(n_elements, n_gauss_points)``. |
| [flat_to_element_gauss_weights](#skrom.rom.ecm.helpers.flat_to_element_gauss_weights) | Convert flat ECM-selected Gauss-point data to a dense element/Gauss array. |
| [with_elements](#skrom.rom.ecm.helpers.with_elements) | Return a similar ``FacetBasis`` restricted to a subset of elements. |

### active_ecm_elements { #skrom.rom.ecm.helpers.active_ecm_elements }

```python
rom.ecm.helpers.active_ecm_elements(weight_array, *, atol=0.0)
```

Return element indices whose ECM weight row has at least one active Gauss point.

### dense_ecm_weights { #skrom.rom.ecm.helpers.dense_ecm_weights }

```python
rom.ecm.helpers.dense_ecm_weights(
    weight_data,
    n_elements,
    n_gauss_points,
    *,
    dtype=np.float64,
)
```

Build a dense ECM-weight array of shape ``(n_elements, n_gauss_points)``.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name           | Type                                           | Description                                                                                                                                                                                         | Default      |
|----------------|------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|--------------|
| weight_data    | Mapping\[int, Sequence\[float\]\] \| ArrayLike | Either: - a mapping ``element_id -> sequence_of_length_n_gauss_points``; or - a dense array of shape ``(n_elements, n_gauss_points)``; or - a flat array of length ``n_elements * n_gauss_points``. | _required_   |
| n_elements     | int                                            | Number of elements in the full mesh.                                                                                                                                                                | _required_   |
| n_gauss_points | int                                            | Number of Gauss points per element.                                                                                                                                                                 | _required_   |
| dtype          | DTypeLike                                      | Numeric dtype of the returned array.                                                                                                                                                                | `np.float64` |

### flat_to_element_gauss_weights { #skrom.rom.ecm.helpers.flat_to_element_gauss_weights }

```python
rom.ecm.helpers.flat_to_element_gauss_weights(
    n_elements,
    n_gauss_points,
    selected_indices,
    selected_weights,
    *,
    base_quadrature_weights=None,
    dtype=np.float64,
)
```

Convert flat ECM-selected Gauss-point data to a dense element/Gauss array.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name                    | Type              | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | Default      |
|-------------------------|-------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|--------------|
| n_elements              | int               | Number of elements in the full mesh.                                                                                                                                                                                                 | _required_   |
| n_gauss_points          | int               | Number of Gauss points per element.                                                                                                                                                                                                  | _required_   |
| selected_indices        | ArrayLike         | Flat Gauss-point indices as returned by an ECM solve.                                                                                                                                                                                | _required_   |
| selected_weights        | ArrayLike         | ECM weights aligned with ``selected_indices``.                                                                                                                                                                                       | _required_   |
| base_quadrature_weights | ArrayLike \| None | Optional base quadrature weights of length ``n_gauss_points``. When supplied, the returned values are divided by these weights so that the result acts as a multiplicative factor on scikit-fem's native ``basis.dx`` contributions. | `None`       |
| dtype                   | DTypeLike         | Numeric dtype of the returned array.                                                                                                                                                                                                 | `np.float64` |

### with_elements { #skrom.rom.ecm.helpers.with_elements }

```python
rom.ecm.helpers.with_elements(self, elements=None)
```

Return a similar ``FacetBasis`` restricted to a subset of elements.
